_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Priority Pyramid Calendar
_meta.description: The Priority Pyramid Calendar is a visually intuitive event management component built with Shadcn UI, designed to help users organize and prioritize their schedules efficiently. Events are stacked in a pyramid-like layout for each day, with larger blocks representing higher-priority tasks, making it easy to identify critical items at a glance. Users can add events with a selected date and priority using an interactive form that includes Shadcn UI inputs, calendar popovers, and priority selectors. The calendar supports multiple overview modes, allowing users to view events for a single month, three months, six months, or all events at once. The layout is compact and scrollable, ensuring that even days with numerous events remain readable, and the design adapts seamlessly to both light and dark themes. This component combines clarity, functionality, and aesthetic appeal, making it ideal for event-heavy schedules where prioritization is key.
